name: data-handlers
description: Extensible normalization and validation library with pluggable handlers (name, number, date, cpf, cnpj, phone, cep, slug) — zero dependencies, built for the Brazilian market 🇧🇷

scripts.release:patch: pnpm test && pnpm version patch && pnpm publish
scripts.release:minor: pnpm test && pnpm version minor && pnpm publish
scripts.release:major: pnpm test && pnpm version major && pnpm publish

author: Emersom Oliveira
